name: hmip-plugin-fusionsolar
description: Homematic IP HCU plugin to read and control a Huawei Sun2000 PV system locally via Modbus TCP, with optional FusionSolar cloud fallback.

scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/hcu/client.js && node --check src/hcu/messages.js && node --check src/sun2000/poller.js && node --check src/sun2000/modbus.js && node --check src/sun2000/registers.js && node --check src/devices/mapper.js && node --check src/dashboard/server.js && node --check src/dashboard/access.js && node --check src/history.js && node --check src/history-store.js && node --check src/update-check.js && node --check src/logger.js && node --check src/hcuLog.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/notifications/index.js && node --check src/notifications/detector.js && node --check src/notifications/grouping.js && node --check src/notifications/dispatcher.js && node --check src/notifications/telegram.js && node --check src/notifications/store.js && node --check src/notifications/format.js && node --check src/dashboard/public/app.js && node --check src/dashboard/public/i18n.js && node --check src/dashboard/public/chart.js && eslint "src/**/*.js" eslint.config.js
